parsed.featureName: Dealing and bidding in standard Skat
background: the deck is shuffled deterministically for the test seed
no card has been revealed from the skat

scenarios.title: Each player receives ten cards and the skat contains two cards
steps: each player has exactly ten cards
the skat contains exactly two cards
the full deck still contains 120 eyes internally

scenarios.title: The dealer rotates left after a completed game
steps: one full game has been completed
the dealer is the next seat to the left

scenarios.title: The player left of the dealer speaks first
steps: the first active bidder is the player left of the dealer

scenarios.title: After both opponents finish, the dealer speaks next
steps: the dealer becomes the next speaker

scenarios.title: A player who cannot support the next bid must pass
steps: the current bid is above a player's ceiling
that player is asked to continue
the auction does not assign the contract to that player

scenarios.title: The highest surviving bidder becomes declarer
steps: one player has made the highest legal bid
the other two players have passed

scenarios.title: The auction ends when the last opposing bidder passes
steps: two players have passed after a winning bid
the game continues to contract selection

scenarios.title: The declarer may choose Grand, Null, or a suit game only
steps: the declarer has won the auction
the declarer chooses a game type
the available choices are Grand, Null, Clubs, Spades, Hearts, and Diamonds
no other game type is offered

scenarios.title: Suit game base value: Clubs
steps: the declarer chooses a suit game with trump suit Clubs

scenarios.title: Suit game base value: Spades
steps: the declarer chooses a suit game with trump suit Spades

scenarios.title: Suit game base value: Hearts
steps: the declarer chooses a suit game with trump suit Hearts

scenarios.title: Suit game base value: Diamonds
steps: the declarer chooses a suit game with trump suit Diamonds

scenarios.title: Hidden information from the skat is not exposed during bidding
steps: the skat cards are still hidden
bidding is displayed to the human
the hidden skat identities are not shown
the protocol contains no discard details

background: the game uses a deterministic test seed

scenarios.title: Suit game trump structure: Clubs
steps: the contract is a suit game with trump suit Clubs
the jacks are higher than every card of the trump suit
the trump suit cards are higher than every non-trump suit card

scenarios.title: Suit game trump structure: Spades
steps: the contract is a suit game with trump suit Spades
the jacks are higher than every card of the trump suit
the trump suit cards are higher than every non-trump suit card

scenarios.title: Suit game trump structure: Hearts
steps: the contract is a suit game with trump suit Hearts
the jacks are higher than every card of the trump suit
the trump suit cards are higher than every non-trump suit card

scenarios.title: Suit game trump structure: Diamonds
steps: the contract is a suit game with trump suit Diamonds
the jacks are higher than every card of the trump suit
the trump suit cards are higher than every non-trump suit card

scenarios.title: The jack order in a suit game is Clubs, Spades, Hearts, Diamonds
steps: the contract is a suit game
two or more jacks are compared

scenarios.title: The trump suit cards follow the jack order
steps: the contract is a suit game with Hearts as trump
Hearts cards are ordered for play

scenarios.title: In Grand, only jacks are trumps
steps: only the four jacks are trumps
every non-jack card is a plain suit card

scenarios.title: In Grand, the jack order is the only trump order
In Grand, suit cards retain their suit order outside trump play
steps: Hearts cards are sorted within their suit

scenarios.title: In Null, there are no trumps
Null order: Clubs
steps: the cards of Clubs are ordered
the order is Ace, King, Queen, Jack, Ten, Nine, Eight, Seven

scenarios.title: Null order: Spades
steps: the cards of Spades are ordered
the order is Ace, King, Queen, Jack, Ten, Nine, Eight, Seven

scenarios.title: Null order: Hearts
steps: the cards of Hearts are ordered
the order is Ace, King, Queen, Jack, Ten, Nine, Eight, Seven

scenarios.title: Null order: Diamonds
steps: the cards of Diamonds are ordered
the order is Ace, King, Queen, Jack, Ten, Nine, Eight, Seven

scenarios.title: Null ignores the trump hierarchy from suit and Grand games
steps: a jack is compared with another card
the jack is not treated as trump
only the lead suit can win the trick

scenarios.title: The human hand is sorted by trump groups before plain suits
steps: the human hand contains trumps and plain suits
the order inside each group is deterministic

scenarios.title: The protocol does not reveal hidden discard cards while sorting the hand
steps: the skat phase has not been completed
the hand is rendered and logged
no hidden discard identities are revealed

parsed.featureName: Trick play and legal move behavior
background: a valid contract has been chosen

scenarios.title: A player must follow the led suit if they can
steps: a plain suit card has been led
the next player holds at least one card of that suit
the next player chooses a card
only cards of the led suit are legal

scenarios.title: A player may play any card if they cannot follow the led suit
steps: a plain suit card has been led
the next player holds no card of that suit
the next player chooses a card
any card from the hand is legal

scenarios.title: In a suit game, trump must be followed if trump is led and available
steps: a trump card has been led in a suit game
the next player holds at least one trump
the next player chooses a card

scenarios.title: In Grand, a led jack must be followed by a jack if possible
steps: a jack has been led in Grand
the next player holds at least one jack
the next player chooses a card

scenarios.title: In Null, the led suit must be followed if possible
steps: a card of Diamonds has been led in Null
the next player holds at least one Diamond
the next player chooses a card

scenarios.title: The highest legal card wins a suit trick
steps: Hearts are led in a suit game
the trick contains multiple Hearts cards
the highest Heart among the legal cards wins

scenarios.title: A trump beats every non-trump in a suit game
steps: a suit game trick contains both trump and plain suit cards

scenarios.title: In Grand, the highest jack beats every non-jack
steps: a Grand trick contains jacks and suit cards

scenarios.title: In Null, the highest card of the led suit wins
steps: the trick contains multiple Diamonds cards

scenarios.title: The trick winner always leads the next trick
steps: a trick has just been resolved
the winner of the previous trick leads

scenarios.title: An illegal move is rejected and does not advance the trick
steps: the player attempts a different suit
the trick state does not advance
the legal move hint remains visible

scenarios.title: The play phase ends after ten completed tricks
steps: nine tricks have already been completed
the game can move to the result phase

parsed.featureName: Scoring, winner determination, and result presentation
background: a full game has been played to completion
every card point is accounted for internally

scenarios.title: The full deck always totals 120 eyes
steps: the points of all cards are summed

scenarios.title: Trick points plus skat points still total 120 eyes
steps: some cards are in the skat

scenarios.title: Declarer wins when reaching 61 eyes or more
Defenders win when the declarer stays at 60 eyes or fewer
Schneider is reached at 90 eyes or more for the winning side
steps: Schneider is reported for that side

scenarios.title: Schwarz is reached when one side takes all tricks
steps: one side has taken all ten tricks
Schwarz is reported for that side

scenarios.title: The winner is shown automatically after the final trick
steps: the tenth trick has been resolved
the winner is shown without manual prompting

scenarios.title: The result remains inspectable in the project log
steps: the phase log contains the final outcome

background: the app is opened on a mobile viewport
the current run is being observed by the human

scenarios.title: The skat discard identities are not revealed before the discard is completed
steps: the skat phase has not been completed
no hidden discard identity is visible

scenarios.title: Hidden cards are not exposed through the public result text
steps: the game is still in progress
the hidden skat cards are not disclosed

scenarios.title: The human hand remains readable on a narrow screen
steps: cards remain visible without horizontal overflow

scenarios.title: Legal action buttons remain usable on a mobile screen
steps: the important actions are reachable on a narrow display

scenarios.title: The run log records phase, blocker, and next action
A completed feature records the verification outcome
steps: the feature slice has been verified
